title: How Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY Uses AI
summary: Austin Marchese outlines a four-pillar AI usage framework based on how entrepreneur Alex Hormozi runs his businesses. The pillars are data as competitive advantage, voice-first design before AI implementation, workflow decomposition, and compound effects. The video also highlights a common team mistake that required executive intervention to correct.
